title: pharus glaber var. pubescens
intro: Pharus glaber var. pubescens, also known as the hairy smoothstem grass, is a perennial grass species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pharus glaber var. pubescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of Pharus glaber var. pubescens include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used topically in ointments and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
